name: memorialconnect
description: Digital Funeral Program & Memorial Experience Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,admin,memorial -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @memorialconnect/api" "npm run dev -w @memorialconnect/admin" "npm run dev -w @memorialconnect/memorial"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @memorialconnect/shared && npm run build -w @memorialconnect/api && npm run build -w @memorialconnect/admin && npm run build -w @memorialconnect/memorial
